entities.name: Superposition
entities.context: Company that keeps founders in their own UI and Slack workflows; uses Careerspan as invisible backend data source

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company handling candidate-side experience with story-based applications and high-resolution assessments

entities.name: Notion
entities.context: Used for job landing pages on the candidate side of the Careerspan flow

entities.name: Slack
entities.context: Part of Superposition's employer workflow that they want to preserve

entities.name: dual gating
entities.context: Undesirable practice of having two independent heavy filters in evaluation; both parties want to avoid

entities.name: role-coded Careerspan application flow
entities.context: Application process where candidates tell stories and fill gaps before assessment

entities.name: Superposition reasoning agent
entities.context: Superposition's AI evaluation system that processes Careerspan data

relationships.context: Partnership where Careerspan becomes invisible backend data source for Superposition
Candidates see Notion-based job landing page before applying
Employers stay in Slack workflows without learning new UI
Careerspan assessments feed into Superposition's reasoning agent for unified evaluation
Both parties agree dual gating is undesirable; want single coherent pipeline
